meaning: n.(过膝的军用)长统靴,铁靴政策(强迫别人屈服的粗暴手段),压迫者
examples: When we came to power, a part of the country was under the LTTE jackboot.
It has a music and flats . It is a martial music. It has a jackboot rhythm.
All post-war German history has been about doing right by European countries that once suffered under the Nazi jackboot.
